title: Hezbollah is bombing northern Israel again. Residents are staying put.
summary_full: Rather than evacuation, Israel’s defense minister said the mission now is “to protect northern communities against raids and anti-tank fire.”
summary_public: Rather than evacuation, Israel’s defense minister said the mission now is “to protect northern communities against raids and anti-tank fire.”

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Hezbollah is bombing northern Israel again.
